data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimize choice to reduce decision time for users.
data.technical_spec: Simplified interfaces with clear choices lead to a seamless user experience.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes navigation with easier to access interactive elements.
data.technical_spec: Menus and buttons are strategically positioned to support faster and more natural interaction.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhancing perceived usability through aesthetic appeal.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes consistent, appealing design elements to enhance user experience.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items for better user navigation.
data.technical_spec: Content and navigation elements are grouped logically to improve comprehension.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limiting displayed information to prevent cognitive overload.
data.technical_spec: Presents information chunks that users can process immediately, aiding effective interaction.
